Our Story

We believe in better workspaces.

Deskbly was born from a simple frustration: most workspace advice is either too vague to be useful or too expensive to be realistic.

Mission

Where you work shapes how well you work.

Most people spend eight hours a day at their desk yet give almost no thought to the environment they work in. A good chair, the right monitor height, decent lighting — these are not luxuries. They are infrastructure.

Our mission is to make high-quality workspace advice accessible to everyone — whether you are setting up your first home office on a tight budget or building a professional-grade studio.

Read our articles

Expert topics

Workspace · Gear · Productivity

100%

Independent

Values

What we stand for

Honest

We call out bad products. We admit when we are wrong. No affiliate-driven fluff.

Practical

Every article comes with real recommendations you can act on today, not hypothetical advice.

Opinionated

We have strong views on what makes a great workspace. We'll tell you exactly what we think.

Independent

No corporate backing, no paid placements. Just people who care deeply about where they work.

Team

Meet the writers

Mia Collins

Workspace Designer

A decade designing ergonomic workspaces for remote teams. She believes environment is the most underrated productivity tool.

James Park

Tech Reviewer

Tested hundreds of keyboards, monitors, and desk accessories. If it goes on a desk, he has a strong opinion about it.

Sara Osei

Productivity Researcher

Studies how physical and digital environments affect focus and output. Her writing bridges neuroscience and practical advice.

Tom Hadley

Ergonomics Specialist

Certified ergonomist who left corporate consulting to write about desks, chairs, and the science of sitting — and standing.

Want to work with us?

Have a product to review or a story idea? We would love to hear from you.
